$description: Toast component tokens — transient floating notifications. Where the alert is an in-flow tinted banner, the toast is a floating neutral surface (background.alt + shadow.dialog) with a variant accent rail; it announces, lingers briefly, and leaves.

toast.$description: Transient notification surface. One neutral surface for every variant; the variant expresses itself through the 3px accent rail and heading/icon color only, so stacked toasts read as one family. Pair with role=status (danger: role=alert) in the component.

background.$description: Elevated neutral surface — same tier as cards/panels. Toasts float, so depth comes from shadow.dialog, not a tint.

foreground.$description: Body text — primary foreground on background.alt (11.2:1 AAA).

border.$description: Structural chrome edge — one step above border.alt so the floating surface separates from whatever it overlaps.

accent.$description: Quiet rail for variant-less toasts — secondary foreground, reads as chrome rather than status.
Phosphor green rail + heading (#4ADE6E). 9.0:1 on the toast surface.
Amber rail + heading (#FCD34D). 9.7:1 on the toast surface.
Light red rail + heading (#F87171). 5.7:1 on the toast surface.
Light blue rail + heading (#93C5FD). 6.1:1 on the toast surface.

radius.$description: Toast corner radius — 8px, same surface language as alerts and dropdowns.
